description: The marketing team has noticed that single-page visits often report 0 seconds duration. To fix this, configure a 'Heartbeat' timer in Matomo Tag Manager to accurately track time-on-page. Create and publish a Tag Manager container named 'BlogTracker' for the 'Initial Site' with the heartbeat timer enabled and set to 15 seconds within the Matomo Configuration. Ensure the container version is published. Login credentials: admin / Admin12345.
